text.autoconfig.bossbartools.title: Boss Bar Tools Configuration
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.option.hide: Master toggle for hiding boss bars. When disabled, no boss bars will be hidden regardless of filters.
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.option.show: Show a message in the action bar when toggling boss bar visibility with the keybind
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.option.enab: Show detailed debug information in the console for troubleshooting filtering issues
When enabled, only boss bars matching your filters will be hidden. When disabled, ALL boss bars are hidden.
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.keybind.inf: Press 'H' key to toggle boss bars in-game. You can change this keybind in Options > Controls > Key Binds > Boss Bar Tools.
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.option.exac: Boss bars with titles that exactly match these strings will be hidden (case-insensitive)
Hide boss bars whose titles exactly match the specified strings. Matching is case-insensitive.
Examples: 'Ender Dragon' will hide only boss bars titled exactly 'Ender Dragon', but not 'The Ender Dragon' or 'Ender Dragon Health'.
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.option.cont: Boss bars with titles containing any of these strings will be hidden (case-insensitive)
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.contains.de: Hide boss bars whose titles contain the specified strings anywhere within them. Matching is case-insensitive.
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.contains.ex: Examples: 'fish' will hide 'Big Fish', 'Fishing Progress', 'Goldfish Health', etc. 'dragon' will hide 'Ender Dragon', 'Dragon Fight', etc.
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.option.rege: Boss bars with titles matching these regular expressions will be hidden. Advanced users only!
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.regex.descr: Hide boss bars whose titles match the specified regular expressions. This is for advanced users familiar with regex patterns.
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.regex.examp: Examples: '^.*[Ff]ish.*$' matches any title containing 'fish' or 'Fish'. '\\d+%' matches titles with percentages like '75%'.
text.autoconfig.bossbartools.regex.warni: Warning: Invalid regex patterns will be ignored. Test your patterns carefully!
